## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project coding standards / 代码遵循项目编码规范
- [ ] Module extends ModuleBase with proper coupling declarations / 模块继承 ModuleBase 并正确声明耦合
- [ ] No cross-domain direct imports (use field/bus/store) / 无跨域直接导入
- [ ] No feature flags / 无功能开关
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
